en.value: The media institutions have been flourishing after the restoration of the democracy in 1991 in Nepal. Despite impressive quantitative figures, the quality of the contents is often poor. A general acceptance in the Nepali media is that the professional values and codes of conduct are not implemented, due to lack of awareness and proper understanding. The activity 'Promotion of Self-Regulation for Strengthening Media Independence" will assess the status of self-regulation in the media institutions and provide necessary recommendations to them and media regulatory bodies and stakeholders. The findings of the assessment will be shared among the journalists, editors and media regulatory bodies organizing a seminar.
